mapper.select: SELECT MONTH(s.upload_time) AS month, SUM(s.actual_power_consumption) AS totalLight, SUM(s.original_power_consumption) - SUM(s.actual_power_consumption) AS totalEconomyLight, SUM(s.original_carbon_emission) AS origCarbon, SUM(s.actualCarbonEmission) AS actualCarbon FROM t_tunnel_statistics s INNER JOIN t_user_tunnel u ON s.tunnel_id = u.tunnel_name_id AND u.user_id = #{userId} INNER JOIN t_tunnel_name_result t ON u.tunnel_name_id = t.id AND t.level = 4 WHERE s.upload_time >= #{yearStart} AND s.upload_time < #{yearEnd} GROUP BY MONTH(s.upload_time) ORDER BY month
